response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with solid full-stack and distributed-systems exposure, but the role is an executive CTO position requiring 5+ years of senior technical leadership, a track record scaling teams from 10 to 30+, and production multi-agent AI systems in regulated fintech contexts. The resume shows no people-management or executive experience, no demonstrated multi-agent AI production work, and only tangential fintech exposure (RIDE Capital for ~1 year). Recent Stripe tenure is too short and at IC level to bridge this gap.
strengths: Strong distributed-systems and low-latency backend experience (Dunnhumby/Sociomantic, Stripe)
Some AI-agent infrastructure exposure via MCP tooling at Stripe
Software craftsmanship discipline: TDD, CI/CD, testability, observability mindset
concerns: No evidence of executive leadership or scaling engineering orgs from 10 to 30+
No demonstrated production multi-agent AI systems in high-stakes commercial settings
Limited fintech-infrastructure depth (credit risk, working capital, regulatory compliance)

key_factors.factor: No production multi-agent AI systems experience
